com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
  • Enclosing class:
    PaymentRequest.CommercialCard

    public static class PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String AlternateTaxID
      The alternate
      java.lang.String CustomerTaxID
      When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01 - Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is customer’s federal tax ID.
      When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is customer’s VAT registration number.
      java.lang.String MerChantTaxID
      When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01- Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is merchant’s federal tax ID.
      When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is merchant’s VAT registration number.
      java.lang.String TaxAmount
      Tax Amount.
      java.lang.String TaxRate
      The rate of tax of field TaxType.
      java.lang.String TaxType
      The type of the tax.
      java.lang.String VATInvoiceNumber
      Valid when Tax Type = 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT)

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TaxDetail() 

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • TaxType

        public java.lang.String TaxType
        The type of the tax.

        00 - Unknown
        01 - Federal/National Sales Tax (total and sub)
        02 - State Sales Tax
        03 - City Sales Tax
        04 - Local Sales Tax (total and sub)
        05 - Municipal Sales Tax
        06 - Duty Tax
        07 - Value Added Tax (VAT) / Alternate Tax
        08 - Goods and Services Tax (GST)
        09 - Provincial Sales Tax (PST)
        10 - Room Tax
        11 - Occupancy Tax
        12 - Energy Tax

        Attribute: n2

      • TaxAmount

        public java.lang.String TaxAmount
        Tax Amount.
        The portion of the amount that represents the tax of field TaxType. Includes 2 implied decimals.

        Attribute: n..12

      • TaxRate

        public java.lang.String TaxRate
        The rate of tax of field TaxType. Includes 2 implied decimals.

        Attribute: n..4

      • MerChantTaxID

        public java.lang.String MerChantTaxID
        When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01- Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is merchant’s federal tax ID.
        When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is merchant’s VAT registration number.

        Attribute: ans..15

      • CustomerTaxID

        public java.lang.String CustomerTaxID
        When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01 - Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is customer’s federal tax ID.
        When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is customer’s VAT registration number.

        Attribute: ans..15

      • VATInvoiceNumber

        public java.lang.String VATInvoiceNumber
        Valid when Tax Type = 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT)

        Attribute: ans..16

      • AlternateTaxID

        public java.lang.String AlternateTaxID
        The alternate

        Attribute: n..12

        Since:
        V1.08.00

    • Constructor Detail

      • TaxDetail

        public TaxDetail()
